calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bressler for Pearl Chun (Executor).

Mr. Bressler stated that he believed Ms. Ng qualified for billing of her hours as a Paralegal except for the requirement of continued education. In addition, he referred to exhibit-C of the time sheet stating that he was not trying to charge the estate for all of the items, that only part of it was extraordinary, that the sale of the house was difficult, that he could not find the paper work on th IBM account and that he thought it was reinvested. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Continued To Jan-11-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Continued To Dec-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3724 Moraga St., San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Jun-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bressler for Pearl Chun (Executor).

The sale was confirmed at $599,000.00. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order). No bond is required.

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Handa.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
